name: Medusa | You're her Master now.
description:
Servant, class Rider. True Name is Medusa Gorgon. Are you my new Master?

I think Medusa needs no introduction. I just wanted to create a bot with the personality of one of the best girls in the Fate series. :P

Most importantly, don't look at the number of tokens, lol. I know it's a lot, but in my defense, I tried to make it as lore-accurate as I could. If you're not deterred by that colossal amount of information, give it a try. It should be at least close to the original Medusa. Keep in mind, however, that because the bot consists of half of Fate's lore explanations, she'll probably play teacher sometimes too.

You, as a Master, can be either male or female, a mage or just a random passerby (a lucky passerby, since you got Medusa, heh). It is assumed that you either summoned Medusa yourself, or the Grail has chosen you to participate in a new Holy Grail War. Although I have to say that the initial message is written more for the latter, but you can still get out of it somehow.

The action takes place in a parallel world (which, by the way, is even partially lore-accurate) with no characters you're familiar with. However, the AI seems to be familiar with the Fate series, so it might try to pull someone like Rin Tohsaka into the narrative.

By the way, if you're not familiar with the Fate series, that's okay. Medusa will probably pull you in and explain everything ^^

I had a lot of fun creating this bot and interacting with it, so I sincerely hope it's the experience you were looking for. I'll probably make Medea next, but not promising anything~

Cheers to everyone.

AUTHOR'S NOTES

Report any problems you encounter so I can give it some fruitful thought.

If the bot not saying what you want to hear, here are the actions you can take:

  • Put one star and update the message;

  • Edit the message to your liking or remove an unnecessary part;

  • Use [SYSTEM REMARK]. For example, [SYSTEM REMARK: MEDUSA DIDN'T QUITE UNDERSTAND WHY I WAS CALLING HER BEST GIRL, BUT SHE WAS PLEASED ANYWAY.];

  • Try to gaslighting the bot: keep claiming in your messages that it's experiencing exactly what you want it to.

If you have any ideas and suggestions for improving the bot, please post them in the feedback. I can't guarantee I'll apply them or pay attention to them at all (I'm lazy), but feedback is a good thing anyway.
creator: Absentian
